content: safari-web-extension-converter handles ~70-80% of a Chrome MV3 extension; Chrome-specific APIs (e.g. webRequest in MV3) are unsupported in Safari and fail silently. App Store review rejects: mentioning competing browsers (Chrome/Firefox/Edge) by name in the description, emoji in descriptions, donation content (non-nonprofits), calling features beta/over-promising. Safari extension can only message its container app via native messaging.
